title: Shiva Shakthi
subTitle: Parvati advises Lord Shiva to strike Tripura Sundari since she is a form of Adi Shakthi, but he refuses. Later, the Asuras seize the chance and dart the Shivastra at Lord Shiva.

title: Shiva Shakthi
subTitle: Kartikeya is devastated as Yama Dev arrives to take his mother's soul. In desperation, he implores Lord Shiva to save her life. How will Lord Shiva respond in this critical moment?

title: Chakori
subTitle: Chakor wants to escape from school with Bhuvan and heads to Azadganj by keeping Arjun distracted, so that they do not get caught.

title: Chakori
subTitle: When Aditya demands to talk to Chakor to congratulate her, Arjun realises that Bhuwan and Chakor are nowhere to be seen. Chakor consoles Bhuwan and tells him that they have to save Imli at any cost.

title: Chakori
subTitle: Ishwar and Aabha confront Chakor and try to stop her from going back to her father. However, she convinces them to let her go.

title: Chakori
subTitle: Kasturi begs Tejaswini to spare Imli from bonded labour. Later, Chakori arrives at the mansion and sees a shocking sight.

title: Chakori
subTitle: When Ishwar breaks some unexpected news, Kamalnarayan grows furious. Soon, Kamalnarayan instructs his gunmen to attack Ishwar and Aabha.

title: Chakori
subTitle: Chakor, a young girl, who was kept as a collateral for money before she was born grows up into a free-spirited athlete. She raises her voice against the system of bonded labour in her village.

title: Magalu Janaki

title: Magalu Janaki
subTitle: Chandu Bargi overhears Janaki asking Chanchala for Niranjan's photo from her cell phone. Upon realising that it is meant to be sent to CSP, he quickly deletes all the photos from Chanchala's phone before they can be sent.

title: Magalu Janaki
subTitle: Janaki's efforts to become self-reliant finally pay off as she lands herself a job opportunity. With Niranjan being questioned about his marriage by his mother, will he be forced to come clean now?

subTitle: Punda seeks relief from his severe headache through an oil massage. However, he ends up losing his hair due to an accidental oil mix-up.

subTitle: Upon learning that Mythri went missing in a fair, Janaki grows suspicious and informs her that even Shyamala's daughter had a similar case of missing.

subTitle: Tarakasura, consumed by worry for his sons, resolves to confront Lord Shiva in a desperate attempt to save them. However, Lord Shiva, wielding his divine powers, takes action by launching Tarakasura's sons into space and arranging them as targets.

subTitle: Sheela Bhushan meets her mentor CSP and shares her happiness of meeting him after a long time. While recollecting old memories, she expresses regret for being the opposing lawyer in the Varun Vaibhav case.

subTitle: Janaki meets Mythri Mahananda and notices her worried look. When Janaki enquires her about it, Mythri confesses to finding her childhood photograph in an ashram requests Janaki's help in finding her biological parents.

title: Papa Pandu
subTitle: Srihari accidentally spills oil on the floor, causing Charu to slip and fracture her leg. However, Charu accuses Srihari of deliberately causing her injury.

title: Papa Pandu
subTitle: A heartbroken Srihari resolves to remain single for his entire life. However, Srimathi decides to change his mind and sets him up with Soumya.

title: Jhansi Ki Rani
subTitle: Gangadhar pursues Moti Bai, inviting her to his dance school. Meanwhile, an injured Manu triumphs over George. Patriotic villagers block George's escape attempt.

title: Magalu Janaki
subTitle: Mythri's happiness is short-lived when Chandramurthy introduces his daughter Dhatri who went missing in the fair.

title: Magalu Janaki
subTitle: While on their way back to home, Janaki notices a fortune-teller and recommends Mythri to seek his guidance as his prophecy has come true for her. Taking Janaki's advise, Mythri asks him about her parents, to which he makes a mysterious prophecy.

title: Shiva Shakthi
subTitle: Lord Shiva quells the cruelty of Tarakasura's sons, ending their lives with his powerful Pashupatastra. However, another Asura, unable to bear this defeat, launches an attack on Lord Shiva in retaliation.

title: Shiva Shakthi
subTitle: Karthikeya discovers the truth about his lineage through Guruji. Meanwhile, Lord Shiva and Goddess Parvati invite their son to join them in Kailash. Will he agree to go with them?

title: Shiva Shakthi
subTitle: Kartikeya's steadfast devotion impresses Lord Shiva, who, feeling content, encourages Kartikeya to seek a boon. Seizing the moment, Kartikeya asks for the truth about his parents.

title: Shiva Shakthi
subTitle: Kartikeya is stunned to discover that his father is none other than Lord Shiva himself. Overwhelmed, Kartikeya breaks down, feeling hurt for not being acknowledged as the son of Goddess Parvati and Lord Shiva.

title: Shiva Shakthi
subTitle: Lord Shiva and Goddess Parvati feel saddened as they bid farewell to Kartikeya, who shows no willingness to understand the situation. When will Kartikeya realize that his parents have been protecting him all along?

title: Shiva Shakthi
subTitle: Kartikeya, feeling let down, makes a vow to remain with his guardians and never venture towards Kailash to see his parents. Will he stick to his resolution?

title: Shiva Shakthi
subTitle: Tarakasura's sons, upon lifting the curse and reviving him, learn from Bhandasura the whereabouts of Kartikeya. Will they find Kartikeya in the said location?

title: Shiva Shakthi
subTitle: Kartikeya's whereabouts are discovered by Tarakasura prompting him to make a drastic decision to end his own life. In response, Lord Shiva vows to fulfill his promise of protecting Kartikeya from danger, preparing to take fierce actions to safeguard.

title: Shiva Shakthi
subTitle: Tarakasura's sons plead with Tripura Sundari to protect them from Lord Shiva. Parvati and Shiva face off in the battle of Karma. Who will win?

title: Magalu Janaki
subTitle: Upon learning of Niranjan's decision to divorce Janaki, an irate Chandu orders Niranjan to tear the divorce papers. But Niranjan disobeys the order and refuses to reconsider his decision. How will Chandu react to Niranjan's defiance?

title: Magalu Janaki
subTitle: While being questioned by Janaki, Niranjan informs her that he lied under pressure and he will soon disclose the truth. Having learnt about Niranjan's move, Chandu grows worried and warns Niranjan. What will Niranjan plan to do now?

title: Magalu Janaki
subTitle: Shankar Devagatta decides not to accept the Home Minister ticket and gives it up. Soon, Chandu Bargi is felicitated for being the leading candidate in the upcoming elections. Did Chandu win the election ticket through illegal means?
